Whenever Dances Up Earthquakes attacks, you may exile a card from your hand with a number of time counters on it equal to its mana value. If it doesn't have suspend, it gains suspend. Then, you may remove a time counter from any number of cards you own in exile.

Ward—Pay 2 life
Whenever an opponent loses life for the first time each turn, you may exile two cards from your graveyard. If you do, Vengeance as a Burning Plague deals 2 damage to target creature that player controls.

When Galad Rosell enters, create a Weapon token if you cast him from your hand. Otherwise, you may attach an Equipment you control to him. [i](A Weapon is a colorless Equipment artifact token with “Equipped creature gets +1/+1” and equip {2}.)[/i]
Escape—{2}{W}{W}, Exile three cards from your graveyard.

Flash
When Backbiter enters, up to one target creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn.
Equipped creature gets +2/+1 and has menace.
Equip {3}
Atomic Breath deals X damage to each creature and each planeswalker. If X is 5 or more, it also deals X damage to each opponent.

cards.card_name: Cast Down Into The Briny Deep
cards.rules_text:
As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may waterbend {6}. [i](While paying a waterbend cost, you can tap your artifacts and creatures to help. Each one pays for {1}.)[/i]
Shuffle target nonland permanent an opponent controls into its owner's library. If this spell's additional cost was paid, instead shuffle each nonland permanent you don't control into its owner's library.

Flying, deathtouch, lifelink
Whenever you gain life, put a +1/+1 counter on Count Dracula and create a Blood token. [i](It's an artifact with “{1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.”)[/i]

This spell costs {1} less for each player who lost life this turn.
Destroy target creature.

cards.rules_text:
When The Bloody Crow of Cainhurst enters, create a Blood token. [i](It's an artifact with “{1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.”)[/i]
Whenever you discard a card, add {R}. Until end of turn, you don't lose this mana as steps and phases end.

Ninjutsu {1}{R} [i]({1}{R}, Return an unblocked attacker you control to hand: Put this card onto the battlefield from your hand tapped and attacking.)[/i]
Whenever Naruto Uzumaki or another nontoken creature you control enters, if you didn't cast it from your hand, create a token that's a copy of that creature, except it's a black Shade. It gains haste. Sacrifice that token at the beginning of the next end step. If it's your combat phase, you may have the token enter tapped and attacking.
Return target creature to its owner's hand. If you controlled it, you may put a nonland permanent with equal or lesser mana value from your hand onto the battlefield.

Whenever another artifact you control enters, draw a card.
At the beginning of your upkeep, you may sacrifice ten other artifacts with different names. If you do, you win the game.

cards.rules_text:
Flying
Whenever Super Mario deals combat damage to a player, he becomes prepared. [i](While he's prepared, you may cast a copy of his spell. Doing so unprepares him.)[/i]

{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.
When this artifact is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, draw a card.

cards.rules_text:
When The Hairy Scary Librarian enters, exile the top card of your library. You may play that card until the end of your next turn.
Whenever one or more cards leave your library, The Hairy Scary Librarian deals 1 damage to target player.

When Geronimo Stilton enters, investigate. [i](Create a Clue token. It's an artifact with “{2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.”)[/i]
Activated abilities of artifacts you control cost {1} less to activate. This effect can't reduce the mana in that cost to less than one mana.

You may look at the top of your library at any time.
Equipped creature gets +1/+1.
Whenever equipped creature deals combat damage to a player, until end of turn, you may look at the top card of your library any time, and you may play lands and cast spells from the top of your library.

[+1]: Target player loses 3 life unless they discard a card or sacrifice a nonland permanent.
[-1]: Return target creature card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.
[-5]: Search your library for any number of cards, put those cards into your graveyard, then shuffle.

cards.rules_text:
Draw two cards, then discard two cards.
Escape—{3}{R}, Exile two other cards from your graveyard. [i](You may cast this card from your graveyard for its escape cost.)[/i]

{T}: Add {C}.
{T}: Add {C}{C}. You can't spend this mana to cast nonartifact spells.

Exile target artifact or creature. Its controller draws a card unless its mana value is less than or equal to your devotion to white. [i](Each {W} in the mana costs of permanents you control counts toward your devotion to white.)[/i]
Exile target creature. Its controller creates a Powerstone token. [i](It's an artifact with “{T}: Add {C}. This mana can't be spent to cast a nonartifact spell.”)[/i]

Target player takes an extra turn after this one.
